app.title: Ome Currency Converter
app.tagline: Make an iPhone wallpaper with a home-to-travel exchange table.
app.metaDescription: Generate an iPhone wallpaper showing a home-to-travel currency exchange table for your trip.

controls.currenciesHint: Tap to set home, then travel. Tap again to clear. At most two currencies.
controls.stepHint: Home amount increment for each ladder row.
controls.rowCountHint: How many amounts appear on the wallpaper (3 to 30).
controls.startAmountHint: First home amount on the ladder. Defaults to 1 for dollars and 100 for yen.
controls.includeFooterHint: Show the Updated date, rate credit, and photo credit at the bottom center of the wallpaper.
controls.backgroundHint: Pick a photo or keep a gradient theme.
controls.positionHint: Center the table, or move it left so app icons can sit on the right.
controls.title: Title

status.fetchError: Could not fetch rates. Check your connection and try Refresh.
status.ratesUnavailable: Rates are unavailable for this currency pair. Try Refresh.
status.incompletePair: Select a home currency and a travel currency to preview the wallpaper.
status.backgroundFallback: Photo could not load. Showing the gradient theme instead.

preview.saveHint: On iPhone: download, open in Photos, then set as wallpaper. Tip: tap and hold the downloaded image to save it directly.

footer.credit: Rates from the European Central Bank via {link}. Updated on business days; not for trading.
